name: OWASP SAMM
description: OWASP Software Assurance Maturity Model v2.0

requirements.requirement_text: Understand drivers for application security and establish a strategic plan aligned with business objectives.
requirements.expected_evidence: Application security strategy document, KPI definitions, executive sponsorship records
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop an application security strategy aligned with business goals with defined KPIs and executive sponsorship.

requirements.requirement_text: Measure and report application security metrics to track program effectiveness.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security metrics dashboard, quarterly reporting records
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and track application security KPIs with regular reporting to stakeholders.

requirements.requirement_text: Classify data and applications based on business risk and regulatory requirements.
requirements.expected_evidence: Application inventory with risk tiers, data classification policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Classify all applications by business criticality and apply proportional security controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain application security policies and standards.
requirements.expected_evidence: Application security policy, secure coding standards documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Create comprehensive application security policies and secure coding standards reviewed annually.

requirements.requirement_text: Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory and industry requirements.
requirements.expected_evidence: Compliance mapping documentation, audit results, regulatory assessment
requirements.recommendation_text: Map application security controls to applicable regulations and conduct periodic compliance assessments.

requirements.requirement_text: Define and enforce security requirements in vendor and third-party contracts.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vendor security requirements in contracts, third-party assessment records
requirements.recommendation_text: Include security requirements and right-to-audit clauses in all vendor contracts.

requirements.requirement_text: Provide role-based application security training for all development team members.
requirements.expected_evidence: Training program documentation, completion records, training materials
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement role-based security training for developers, testers, and architects with annual refreshers.

requirements.requirement_text: Provide security guidance and resources accessible to development teams.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security knowledge base, security champion program documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain a security knowledge base and establish a security champion program within development teams.

requirements.requirement_text: Derive security requirements from business functionality and risk analysis.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security requirements documentation, threat model outputs
requirements.recommendation_text: Derive explicit security requirements from threat models and risk assessments for each project.

requirements.requirement_text: Review security requirements and design against security best practices.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security design review records, architecture review checklist
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct security design reviews for all new features and major changes before implementation.

requirements.requirement_text: Perform threat modeling to identify and mitigate design-level security risks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Threat model documents, threat modeling workshop records
requirements.recommendation_text: Perform STRIDE-based threat modeling for all applications and significant feature changes.

requirements.requirement_text: Maintain an accurate and up-to-date application security architecture.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security architecture diagrams, trust boundary documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Document security architecture including trust boundaries, data flows, and security controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Evaluate and select security technologies and frameworks appropriate for the application.
requirements.expected_evidence: Technology evaluation records, security framework adoption documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Evaluate and document security technology choices with justification based on application requirements.

requirements.requirement_text: Use a secure and repeatable build process with integrity verification.
requirements.expected_evidence: CI/CD pipeline security configuration, build integrity verification
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement signed and verified build artifacts with immutable deployment pipelines.

requirements.requirement_text: Manage dependencies and third-party libraries with known vulnerability tracking.
requirements.expected_evidence: Dependency scanning results, SBOM documentation, library update procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Scan dependencies for known vulnerabilities and maintain a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM).

requirements.requirement_text: Enforce secure coding standards through automated and manual review processes.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure coding standards, SAST tool results, code review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate SAST into CI/CD and require security-focused code reviews for all changes.

requirements.requirement_text: Track and manage security defects through a defined lifecycle.
requirements.expected_evidence: Defect tracking process, remediation SLA documentation, defect metrics
requirements.recommendation_text: Track security defects in a centralized system with defined remediation SLAs by severity.

requirements.requirement_text: Classify and prioritize security defects based on risk and business impact.
requirements.expected_evidence: Defect classification criteria, risk-based prioritization documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Classify vulnerabilities using CVSS and prioritize remediation based on exploitability and business impact.

requirements.requirement_text: Analyze root causes of security defects to prevent recurrence.
requirements.expected_evidence: Root cause analysis records, defect trend reports
requirements.recommendation_text: Perform root cause analysis on recurring security defects and implement preventive measures.

requirements.requirement_text: Perform security testing aligned with the application's risk profile.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security test plan, penetration test reports, DAST scan results
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct security testing proportional to application risk including SAST, DAST, and periodic penetration tests.

requirements.requirement_text: Automate security testing in the CI/CD pipeline.
requirements.expected_evidence: Automated security testing in CI/CD, test automation configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate automated security testing (SAST, DAST, SCA) into every CI/CD pipeline run.

requirements.requirement_text: Perform manual security testing for complex vulnerabilities not caught by automation.
requirements.expected_evidence: Manual test plans, penetration test reports, business logic test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Supplement automated testing with manual penetration testing and business logic testing annually.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that security requirements are implemented and tested.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security requirements test cases, verification test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Create test cases for each security requirement and verify implementation before release.

requirements.requirement_text: Test security controls for effectiveness against defined threat scenarios.
requirements.expected_evidence: Threat scenario test cases, control effectiveness test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Test security controls against defined threat scenarios from threat models.

requirements.requirement_text: Maintain secure configurations for all application environments.
requirements.expected_evidence: Environment hardening standards, configuration baseline documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Apply security hardening baselines to all environments and monitor for configuration drift.

requirements.requirement_text: Manage secrets and credentials securely across all environments.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secrets management solution documentation, credential rotation procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Use a dedicated secrets management solution with automated rotation and audit logging.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement monitoring and alerting for security events in production.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security monitoring configuration, alert rules, incident detection records
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy runtime application self-protection (RASP) and security monitoring with real-time alerting.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish an incident response process for application security incidents.
requirements.expected_evidence: Application security incident response plan, playbooks, tabletop exercise records
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop application-specific incident response playbooks and conduct regular exercises.

requirements.requirement_text: Conduct post-incident reviews and implement improvements.
requirements.expected_evidence: Post-incident review reports, improvement action items
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct blameless post-incident reviews and track improvement actions to completion.

requirements.requirement_text: Maintain communication plans for security incident disclosure.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident communication plan, breach notification procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Define incident communication and breach notification procedures compliant with regulatory requirements.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish a formal application security program with dedicated resources and budget.
requirements.expected_evidence: AppSec program charter, team structure, budget documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish a dedicated application security team with defined roles, responsibilities, and budget.

requirements.requirement_text: Integrate security requirements into the standard development workflow and tooling.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security requirements in project management tools, traceability matrix
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate security requirements as first-class items in project management with traceability to tests.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement security gates in the CI/CD pipeline that block deployment on critical findings.
requirements.expected_evidence: CI/CD security gate configuration, blocking criteria documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Configure CI/CD pipelines to block deployments when critical or high security findings are detected.

requirements.requirement_text: Conduct regular penetration testing by qualified internal or external testers.
requirements.expected_evidence: Penetration test reports, tester qualifications, remediation tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Engage qualified penetration testers annually with remediation tracking for all findings.

requirements.requirement_text: Implement infrastructure as code with security configuration validation.
requirements.expected_evidence: IaC security scanning results, infrastructure security standards
requirements.recommendation_text: Use infrastructure as code with automated security configuration validation before deployment.
